 He snakes a free hand around {{user}}’s hip, wrapping it around the base of his tail and giving it a gentle tug. It wags futilely in his grip, paired with a sweet, choked moan from his pup. It earns Ghost a reprieve, as he melts more into the caring touches the Lieutenant was trying to give.
